findings.message: Prefer exec form over shell form for ENTRYPOINT and CMD instructions. Shell form causes the executable to run as a child process to a shell, which doesn't pass OS signals properly. This prevents graceful container shutdown. Use exec form with JSON array syntax: CMD ["executable", "param1", "param2"] instead of CMD executable param1 param2.

Prefer exec form over shell form for ENTRYPOINT and CMD instructions. Shell form causes the executable to run as a child process to a shell, which doesn't pass OS signals properly. This prevents graceful container shutdown. Use exec form with JSON array syntax: CMD ["executable", "param1", "param2"] instead of CMD executable param1 param2.
